text: SECTION II. SUM INSURED AND INSURED DECLARED VALUE (IDV) The Insured Declared Value (IDV) of the vehicle shall be the Sum Insured for the purpose of this policy, fixed at policy commencement based on the manufacturer's listed selling price adjusted for depreciation as per the schedule below:

SUM INSURED AND INSURED DECLARED VALUE (IDV)] Age of Vehicle % of Depreciation Not exceeding 6 months 5% Exceeding 6 months but not exceeding 1 year 15% Exceeding 1 year but not exceeding 2 years 20% Exceeding 2 years but not exceeding 3 years 30% Exceeding 3 years but not exceeding 4 years 40% Exceeding 4 years but not exceeding 5 years 50%

heading: SECTION II. SUM INSURED AND INSURED DECLARED VALUE (IDV)
text: [SECTION II. SUM INSURED AND INSURED DECLARED VALUE (IDV)] The insured vehicle shall be treated as a Constructive Total Loss if the aggregate cost of retrieval and repair exceeds 75% of the IDV.

heading: SECTION III. DEDUCTIBLE
text: SECTION III. DEDUCTIBLE The Company shall not be liable for the first Rs. 1,000 of each and every claim under Section I of this policy. This deductible applies to each occurrence independently, including occurrences giving rise to a Total Loss or Constructive Total Loss claim.

heading: SECTION IV. THIRD PARTY LIABILITY
text: SECTION IV. THIRD PARTY LIABILITY Subject to the limits of liability in the Schedule, the Company will indemnify the insured against all sums the insured becomes legally liable to pay in respect of death of or bodily injury to any person, or damage to third-party property,

heading: SECTION IV. THIRD PARTY LIABILITY
text: [SECTION IV. THIRD PARTY LIABILITY] caused by or arising from use of the vehicle, as required under the Motor Vehicles Act. Provided always that the Company shall not be liable for death, injury, or property damage arising beyond the limits of any public carriageway in connection with loading or unloading of the vehicle.

heading: SECTION V. ADD-ON COVERS
text: SECTION V. ADD-ON COVERS Add-On 1: Nil Depreciation Cover (Zero Dep) In the event of a partial loss claim, no depreciation deduction shall apply to the cost of parts replaced, subject to payment of additional premium. This cover is available for vehicles not exceeding 5 years from date of first

heading: SECTION V. ADD-ON COVERS
text: [SECTION V. ADD-ON COVERS] registration. Add-On 2: Roadside Assistance Emergency towing assistance is provided up to 50 km free of charge in the event of accident or breakdown. Flat tyre replacement using the vehicle's stepney is included. Fuel delivery of up to 5 litres is chargeable at actual cost.

heading: SECTION V. ADD-ON COVERS
text: [SECTION V. ADD-ON COVERS] Add-On 3: Engine Protection Cover Consequential damage to engine parts and gearbox components arising from water ingression due to flood or inundation is covered under this add-on, subject to the claim under Section I being admissible and the vehicle being

heading: SECTION V. ADD-ON COVERS
text: [SECTION V. ADD-ON COVERS] retrieved from the waterlogged area within 72 hours. Exclusion under Engine Protection: Damage to engine or gearbox arising from delay in intimation, from driving the vehicle after it has ingested water, or from gradual corrosion of engine parts, is not covered.

heading: A No Claim Bonus discount is applicable on Own Damage premium at renewal:

heading: A No Claim Bonus discount is applicable on Own Damage premium at renewal:
text: [A No Claim Bonus discount is applicable on Own Damage premium at renewal:] NCB reverts to 0% at the next renewal if any claim is made during the policy period.

heading: SECTION VII. GENERAL CONDITIONS
text: [SECTION VII. GENERAL CONDITIONS] 1. The insured must give immediate written notice to the Company upon the occurrence of any accidental loss or damage. In the case of theft, immediate notice to the police is also required.

heading: SECTION VII. GENERAL CONDITIONS
text: [SECTION VII. GENERAL CONDITIONS] 2. No admission, offer, or promise of payment shall be made by the insured without the written consent of the Company.

heading: SECTION VII. GENERAL CONDITIONS
text: [SECTION VII. GENERAL CONDITIONS] 3. The insured shall take all reasonable steps to safeguard the vehicle from further loss or damage after an accident.

heading: SECTION VII. GENERAL CONDITIONS
text: [SECTION VII. GENERAL CONDITIONS] 4. If a dispute arises as to the quantum payable under this policy, the matter shall be referred to arbitration under the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996.

heading: SECTION VII. GENERAL CONDITIONS
text: [SECTION VII. GENERAL CONDITIONS] 5. The due observance of all terms, conditions, and endorsements of this policy is a condition precedent to any liability of the Company.

heading: SECTION VIII. CLAIM PROCEDURE
text: SECTION VIII. CLAIM PROCEDURE (cid:127) Intimate the claim to the Company within 48 hours of the incident. (cid:127) Do not move or repair the vehicle until a surveyor has been appointed, except for essential emergency repairs not exceeding Rs. 500.

heading: SECTION VIII. CLAIM PROCEDURE
text: [SECTION VIII. CLAIM PROCEDURE] exceeding Rs. 500. (cid:127) Submit completed claim form, RC copy, driving licence, FIR (if applicable), and repair estimate. (cid:127) Payment will be made within 7 working days of completion of documentation.

text: SECTION IX. GENERAL EXCEPTIONS This policy does not cover loss, damage, or liability arising from nuclear weapons, ionising radiation, war, invasion, civil war, mutiny, or warlike operations. Claims where the vehicle was being used outside the permitted geographical
